subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: How does one look forward to the goal of any journey? With hope and with expectation. It is even so with the end of this earthly journey.... Those who have passed on through death, have a sphere of their own. It is not removed from ours
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @the concourse on high, @existence; immortality of the human soul, @angels, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @The Holy Spirit
